name: mill
description: A harness around the claude CLI that runs a spec → design → implement ⇄ review → verify → deliver pipeline.

scripts.build: tsc -p . && cp -r src/prompts dist/prompts && npm run build:web
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --silent && npm run build
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build
